title: Spicy Lamb Kebabs
description: A delicious and flavorful dish inspired by Moroccan cuisine, perfect for a quick and easy meal. The combination of spicy lamb and grilled vegetables creates a mouth-watering flavor.

ingredients.name: Moroccan spice blend
ingredients.notes: Contains cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper

instructions: 2. In a bowl, mix together lamb cubes, olive oil, and Moroccan spice blend.
3. Thread lamb cubes, red onion, red bell pepper, and zucchini onto skewers.
4. Grill kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until lamb reaches 145°F (63°C).
5. Brush kebabs with harissa sauce during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
6. Warm pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it on the grill for 2-3 minutes.
7. Serve kebabs with pita bread and additional harissa sauce on the side.
8. Garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
